reasoning: Search results found on the ITKF website from late 2024 include a snippet that states: "As host nation and reigning world champion, Egypt outlines the concept, technical responsibility, and institutional ambition behind the organization...". Together with Egypt winning the 2024 World Championship, this heavily implies that Egypt was recently announced as the host for the upcoming 2026 championship. Given that the announcement was expected in November 2024 and this content appeared in November 2024 with Egypt openly described as the host nation, the probability is extremely high that Egypt has formally been chosen to host the 2026 ITKF World Championship prior to the July 1, 2025 deadline.
